parameters.content:
## MAXXAM AI — Sheet Writer

**Purpose:** Receive pre-generated content from Claude and append it to the Content_Calendar Google Sheet.

**No AI nodes. No Anthropic credential needed.**

**ONE-TIME SETUP:**
1. Open **Write to Content Calendar** node
2. Replace `1kUfK-wGp_cauo2jApFdm7cj863W7iBYZR9A3qLmx4kE` with your actual Sheet ID
3. Activate this workflow
4. Copy the webhook URL from the Sheet Writer Webhook node

**How it works:**
- Claude generates the LinkedIn post via the /maxxam-linkedin-content skill
- You approve the post in Claude
- Claude POSTs the JSON row to this webhook
- This workflow validates the data and appends it to the sheet

**Test payload:**
```json
{
  "id": "20260321-001",
  "pillar": "3",
  "pillar_name": "Healthcare Automation",
  "platform": "LinkedIn",
  "content_type": "text",
  "topic": "No-show recovery for therapy practices",
  "hook": "Test hook line",
  "body": "Test body content",
  "cta": "Book a call",
  "scheduled_date": "2026-03-24",
  "scheduled_time": "08:00",
  "status": "approved"
}
```

nodes.name: Validate & Build Row
nodes.notes: Validates required fields and builds a clean Content_Calendar row. No AI required.

nodes.name: Write to Content Calendar
nodes.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: Replace 1kUfK-wGp_cauo2jApFdm7cj863W7iBYZR9A3qLmx4kE with your actual Sheet ID.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, id: $('Validate & Build Row').first().json.id, message: 'Row added to Content_Calendar. Review in Google Sheet.' }) }}
